channel.title: Autopapers: Daily AI Deep Dive
channel.description: Automated daily deep dives into the latest AI papers.
channel.ns0:author: Autopapers AI

item.title: [Ep. 12] DeepPapers: 'Attention Is All You Need' Explained 🤯
item.description:
**1. Main Contribution and Novelty** The paper introduces the *Transformer*, a groundbreaking sequence transduction architecture that entirely discards complex recurrent (RNN/LSTM) and convolutional networks. Its novelty lies in relying exclusively on a pure attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between inputs and outputs, eliminating the sequential computation bottleneck of prior architectures. **2. Key Methodology** The Transformer utilizes an encoder-decoder structure built solely on stacked **Multi-Head Self-Attention** and position-wise fully connected feed-forward networks. Key technical innovations include: * **Scaled Dot-Product Attention:** Normalizes the dot product of query and key vectors by the square root of their dimension ($\sqrt{d_k}$) to prevent vanishing gra...


🚀 Enjoyed this deep dive?

  • 📬 Read the TL;DR Newsletter: Subscribe via Brevo
  • 📺 Watch the Visual Breakdown: DeepPapers on YouTube

Automated by Autopapers AI.
